versioning_contract.active_context_version_meaning: Version of the active-context governance system architecture. Incremented when the governance model itself changes structurally.
versioning_contract.increment_active_context_version_when: the governance model or canonical architecture changes fundamentally
versioning_contract.increment_schema_version_when: schema field set changes, validation rules change structurally, or new required fields are added
versioning_contract.schema_2_11_change_summary: INF-FULL-07 resolves the duplicate INF-FULL-05 -> INF-FULL-06 authorization drift by preserving only the excludent-cleanup route as active, materializes INF-FULL-06 -> INF-FULL-07 as the canonical IF-08 authorization gate, updates boot-read receipts to include EXCLUDENT_POLICY.md plus the saved infernus_full_canonroadmap source, and enforces a new inf_full_07_if08_authorization artifact pack while keeping IF-08, waves, bots, runtime, Bedrock, product, secrets, dependency mutation, dry-run, and apply execution fully false.
versioning_contract.schema_version_meaning: Version of ACTIVE_CONTEXT_SCHEMA.json validation contract. Incremented when the schema structure, field set, or validation rules change.
versioning_contract.schema_3_0_change_summary: Compaction refactor: ARIS_BOOT.md replaces 11 boot files, required_files_for_transition removed, versioning history archived to archive/derived_mirrors/versioning_history.md, governance_repairs list archived, artifact_routes updated to new structure. JSON target ≤200 lines.
versioning_contract.schema_3_1_change_summary: Final compaction: completed_phases archived to completed_phases_history.json and replaced by compact summary object, narrative fields in next_action/last_transition/locks compacted to single-line strings.
versioning_contract.schema_3_2_change_summary: Route admission for PURG-PRE: allow purgatorium_full_authority_materialization as a live-route phase class after IF11 closure and operator-reviewed route-admission artifact pack, while preserving all real execution/product/Bedrock/secrets/apply locks false.
versioning_contract.schema_3_3_change_summary: Route admission for PURG-00: allow purgatorium_full_intake as a live-route phase class after PURG-PRE authority/materialization execution and operator-reviewed PURG-00 admission packet, while preserving all real execution/product/Bedrock/secrets/apply locks false.
versioning_contract.schema_3_4_change_summary: PURG-00 route amendment terminal wait-state: close the live route after the source-gap terminal blocker, require operator-supplied primary source packet as the only next input, allow next_phase/active_next_phase to become null explicitly, and preserve all real execution/product/Bedrock/secrets/apply locks false.
versioning_contract.schema_3_5_change_summary: PURG-00 operator source packet intake sync: record the operator-supplied primary source packet as a validated canonical input with project commit, packet SHA, and CI evidence while keeping next_phase/active_next_phase null, PURG-01 closed, and all real execution surfaces false.
versioning_contract.schema_3_6_change_summary: PURG-01 route admission review: record the admission-only review pass, the explicit source-packet field extraction, and the candidate next step request_operator_authorization_for_purg01_route_admission while preserving decision=blocked, next_phase/active_next_phase null, PURG-01 closed, and all real execution surfaces false.
versioning_contract.schema_3_7_change_summary: PURG-01 route admission: open PURG-01 as the live route through operator authorization scoped to route admission only, set next_phase/active_next_phase to PURG-01 with phase class purgatorium_route_admission, require route-admission artifacts and validator enforcement, and keep triage plus every real execution surface closed.
versioning_contract.schema_3_8_change_summary: PURG-01 triage readiness review: record a readiness-only review pass and a planning-only candidate next step while keeping PURG-01 as the admitted route, triage authorization false, finding-fix authorization false, and every real execution surface closed.
versioning_contract.schema_3_9_change_summary: PURG-01 triage planning gate: record a planning-only pass for IF09-FIND-001, require a formal triage plan plus authorization-request candidate, advance the next recommended step to explicit operator authorization for triage, and keep triage, finding-fix, and every real execution surface closed.
versioning_contract.schema_3_10_change_summary: PURG-01 triage authorization gate: record explicit operator authorization for future controlled triage with scope limited to authorization only, allow purg01_triage_authorized=true while keeping triage execution, finding-fix, remediation apply, and every real execution surface closed, and advance the next recommended step to the controlled triage execution gate.
versioning_contract.schema_3_11_change_summary: PURG-01 controlled triage execution gate: record the artifact-only readiness decision for IF09-FIND-001, persist the source-packet plus IF10 handoff integrity evidence, add the controlled triage execution gate state object, and advance the next recommended step to execute_purg01_controlled_triage_artifact_only while every real execution surface remains false.
versioning_contract.schema_3_12_change_summary: PURG-01 controlled triage artifact-only execution: record the deterministic artifact-only execution result, evidence matrix, and no-real-execution attestation for IF09-FIND-001 while preserving the live PURG-01 route, leaving finding-fix/remediation/runtime/product/Bedrock/secrets locks closed, and avoiding any inferred post-transition.
versioning_contract.schema_3_14_change_summary: PURG04 post-merge validation packet: permit the live state to advance from PURG04_TRACK_A_MAIN_MERGE_EXECUTION to PURG04_TRACK_A_POST_MERGE_VALIDATION_PACKET, enforce the operator authorization plus no-real-execution packet artifacts, and allow next_phase/active_next_phase/deferred_phase to become null when the Próxima fase defines no successor.
versioning_contract.schema_3_15_change_summary: Residual risk carry-forward route opening: admit PURG_RESIDUAL_RISK_CARRY_FORWARD_PACKET as the live artifact-only route through an explicit operator route-opening packet, add validator enforcement for the residual candidate chain and new artifacts, materialize the PURG04 post-merge validation successor row in the active Próxima fase, and preserve next_phase/active_next_phase null because the new residual route has no successor row.
versioning_contract.schema_3_16_change_summary: INF revalidation route activation: promote INF_REVALIDATION_ROUTE_ADMISSION_PACKET from the TRACK_REVALIDATION_FIRST candidate into the live active-context route, admit infernus_revalidation_route_admission as a valid live/next route class, require the route-activation plus route-admission artifact family, and preserve next_phase/active_next_phase null because no successor row is active yet for the newly opened INF route.
versioning_contract.schema_3_17_change_summary: INF revalidation readiness activation: promote INF_REVALIDATION_READINESS_PACKET from the live route-admission candidate into the active-context route, admit infernus_revalidation_readiness as a valid live/next route class, require the route-activation plus readiness artifact family, and preserve next_phase/active_next_phase null because no successor row is active yet for the newly opened readiness route.
versioning_contract.schema_3_18_change_summary: INF revalidation operator authorization: promote INF_REVALIDATION_OPERATOR_AUTHORIZATION_PACKET into the live active-context route, record the explicit operator execution-contract authorization without opening execution, add the operator-authorization artifact family plus validator enforcement, materialize the readiness successor row, and preserve next_phase/active_next_phase null because no successor row is active yet for the newly opened operator gate.
versioning_contract.schema_3_19_change_summary: INF revalidation execution: admit INF_REVALIDATION_EXECUTION_PACKET as the live controlled execution gate, add infernus_revalidation_execution as a valid live/next route class for roadmap/validator coherence, require the execution artifact family plus deterministic oracle evidence, materialize the operator-authorization successor row, and preserve next_phase/active_next_phase null because adjudication remains candidate-only after execution.
versioning_contract.schema_3_20_change_summary: INF revalidation adjudication and closure: promote INF_REVALIDATION_ADJUDICATION_OR_CLOSURE_PACKET into the live documentary closure route, add infernus_revalidation_adjudication_or_closure as a valid live/next route class for roadmap/validator coherence, require the adjudication artifact family plus closure decision evidence, and preserve next_phase/active_next_phase null because no successor row is active after canonical closure.
versioning_contract.schema_3_21_change_summary: BENCHUIX schema tracking repair: admit a non-executable benchuix_track top-level block so the BenchUIX roadmap candidate can be tracked in ACTIVE_CONTEXT_STATE.json without altering the live route, while enforcing trilha_lock_active=true and every BenchUIX execution/product/runtime/secret authorization flag as false.
versioning_contract.schema_3_22_change_summary: BENCHUIX tracking generalization: replace single-phase consts in benchuix_track with bounded enums for BENCHUIX-00 through BENCHUIX-27 and CRISOL, preserving non-executable tracking, trilha_lock_active=true, and all BenchUIX execution/product/runtime/secret authorization flags as false.
versioning_contract.schema_3_23_change_summary: BENCHUIX standing authorization materialization: record the operator standing authorization for candidate-only BENCHUIX transitions from BENCHUIX-08 through CRISOL, require a standing authorization artifact family plus validator enforcement, and preserve every real execution/product/runtime/secret/billing/OAuth/customer-data lock as false.
versioning_contract.schema_3_24_change_summary: Naming clarity metadata: permit optional top-level display_name in ACTIVE_CONTEXT_STATE.json so the live phase can carry a human-readable alias without changing phase_id/current_phase_id/next_phase/active_next_phase or any real lock.
versioning_contract.schema_3_25_change_summary: BENCHUIX evidence tracking enrichment: record independently reverified draft_v5 ajuda and cleanup commit/run evidence inside benchuix_track without changing the live route, any phase pointer, or any execution/product/runtime/secret authorization lock.
versioning_contract.schema_3_26_change_summary: BENCHUIX runtime fix evidence tracking: record the independently reverified draft_v5 runtime-fix commit and CI run inside benchuix_track without changing the live route, any phase pointer, or any execution/product/runtime/secret authorization lock.
versioning_contract.schema_3_27_change_summary: BENCHUIX help accordion default-closed evidence tracking: record the independently reverified draft_v5 Ajuda default-closed fix commit and CI run inside benchuix_track without changing the live route, any phase pointer, or any execution/product/runtime/secret authorization lock.
versioning_contract.schema_3_28_change_summary: Adds derived read-only simple-view fields (last_phase, phase_now, next_phase_simple) computed from existing canonical fields, for quick state reading without removing or duplicating source-of-truth fields.
versioning_contract.schema_3_30_change_summary: Lapidarium Fase 5 remaining low-scope review: admit lapidarium_fase5_remaining_low_scope_* tracking fields for the read-only review of F5-004/F5-005/F5-006, recording REMOVE_CANDIDATE decisions with inventory corrections (F5-004/F5-005 are directories not files) and TTS resolution (F5-006 backup superseded by active src/aris/voice/tts.py), while preserving all real execution locks false and no cleanup executed.
versioning_contract.schema_3_34_change_summary: Lapidarium final route reconciliation: admit lapidarium_final_route_reconciliation_* tracking fields for the terminal handoff packet, reclassify stale LAPIDARIUM next-route pointers as historical, record candidate-only DIAGNOSTICO_AUTOMACAO_GATE handoff metadata, and preserve no-macro-execution, no-file-move, and no-cleanup guarantees.
